title: STATUS 9V Photoelectric Smoke Alarm, Battery Operated Fire Detector for Home Bedroom Kitchen Hallway, Includes 9V Battery, Easy Test Button, Low Battery Warning, (9VDCPESA5)
features: Status photoelectric smoke alarm for reliable fire detection Status provides peace of mind with this 9V photoelectric smoke alarm designed for use in homes, flats or rental properties. Ideal for early warning detection of slow-smouldering fires in bedrooms, hallways and kitchens.

Photoelectric sensor for faster smoke response Fitted with a photoelectric sensor that reacts quickly to visible smoke from smouldering materials like furniture or overheated wiring. Reduces false alarms from cooking compared to traditional ionisation detectors.

Battery operated with 9V battery included Ready to use out of the box, this alarm comes complete with a 9V battery for quick, easy installation without wiring. Ideal for homeowners, landlords or tenants looking for hassle-free fire protection.

Test button and low battery warning for safety checks Includes a manual test button for regular function checks, plus a built-in low battery alert to ensure it remains active. Easy to maintain with clear audio signals when the battery needs replacing.

Compact white design for discreet ceiling or wall mounting Finished in neutral white with a slim profile, this alarm blends neatly into any home décor. Suitable for mounting in bedrooms, hallways, kitchens or lounges to meet fire safety standards.
